title: bodied
body:
https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/bodied?in=billy-moreno/sets/scrub/



verse 1

my body's a temple so i gilt it with gold
catch me writing on the walls i'm trying to fill it with soul
mother nature built it and it's never been sold
so when she come collecting bet that i'm a let go
whoa

verse 2

my body is mulch, so much soul for the soil
my life is a river, bank follow the flow
my mind is a trap, it keeps me in the hunt
everybody wanna clap so i sound like a grunt
uh

verse 3

you want me to leave a trail of crumbs when i wander
i'm in the woods trying to outrun the hunter
but i sure do hope we run into each other
that'd be dope, i'm a junkie
there's two kinds of hunger make we wanna break bread
one's for the body bodhi, the other my head
one feel godly don't he, the others almost dead
